# Spells
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Spells&prop=wikitext

The spell is the ability of the wizard. It's used for causing damage to groups of enemies or high damage to a single enemy.<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Primal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Boneshatter.png
| link = Boneshatter
| text = Boneshatter
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CarnivorousSentientSpell.png
| link = Carnivorous Sentient Spell
| text = Carnivorous Sentient Spell
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = MusicOfTheGods.png
| link = Music of the Gods
| text = Music of the Gods
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RecurringTerrorSpell.png
| link = Recurring Terror Spell
| text = Recurring Terror Spell
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TabletOfTheKingsAvatar.png
| link = Tablet of the King’s Avatar
| text = Tablet of the King’s Avatar
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = MysteriousIncantation.png
| link = Mysterious Incantation
| text = Mysterious Incantation
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ThousandSunsSpells.png
| link = Thousand Suns Spells
| text = Thousand Suns Spells
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = The Searing Shower.png
| link = The Searing Shower
| text = The Searing Shower
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = Spell Full of Nature.png
| link = Spell Full of Nature
| text = Spell Full of Nature
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AncientSpellPierce.png
| link = Ancient Spell: Pierce
| text = Ancient Spell: Pierce
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Unique</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = Vitamine Buster.png
| link = Vitamine Buster
| text = Vitamine Buster
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = Planetary Destruction Spell.png
| link = Planetary Destruction Spell
| text = Planetary Destruction Spell
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = Magic Nova Spell.png
| link = Magic Nova Spell
| text = Magic Nova Spell
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = Elemental Detonation Spell.png
| link = Elemental Detonation Spell
| text = Elemental Detonation Spell
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = FireSpraySpell.png
| link = Fire Spray Spell
| text = Fire Spray Spell
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = FlameBurstSpell.png
| link = Flame Burst Spell
| text = Flame Burst Spell
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = FireNovaSpell.png
| link = Fire Nova Spell
| text = Fire Nova Spell
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ScorchingBlastSpell.png
| link = Scorching Blast Spell
| text = Scorching Blast Spell
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DestructionSphereSpell.png
| link = Destruction Sphere Spell
| text = Destruction Sphere Spell
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = PenetratingBlastSpell.png
| link = Penetrating Blast Spell
| text = Penetrating Blast Spell
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
